data.title: Infobip partners with MoneyGram Haas F1 Team for fan engagement in Austin, Texas using RCS and WhatsApp to connect with thousands of fans.
data.description: In VODNJAN, Croatia, Infobip and MoneyGram Haas F1 Team have unveiled an innovative fan engagement initiative during the Austin race week in Texas. By leveraging RCS and WhatsApp, Infobip aims to enhance fan connections by offering a unique interactive experience. This collaboration showcases MoneyGram Haas F1 Team as a tech-savvy and fan-centric team. The initiative allows simultaneous one-on-one interactions with thousands of fans, underlining the team's commitment to embracing digital advancements.

data.title: TNL Mediagene and Geniee partner to expand advertising solution "Cr.ED" reach. Medigene Inc. and Geniee collaborate to boost distribution.
data.description: Mediagene Inc., the Company's prominent Japanese media subsidiary, has recently established a strategic alliance with Geniee, a top AdTech company in Japan. This partnership aims to enhance the market reach of Cr.ED, the successful advertising creative solution by enabling broader distribution through Geniee's platform. This collaboration signifies a key initiative for the Company, aimed at maximizing exposure and engagement for Cr.ED in Japan's competitive advertising industry.

data.title: Celerant introduces geo-fencing in mobile apps to boost foot traffic and capture impulse buys. Oct 16, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: Celerant Technology, a prominent provider of retail software and eCommerce solutions, unveiled a new feature on Oct. 16, 2025, aimed at assisting retailers in boosting foot traffic and seizing impulsive purchases. The innovative functionality utilizes real-time, location-based push notifications through geo-fencing technology, enabling businesses to hone in on potential customers in specific areas. This strategic approach can significantly increase engagement and drive sales for retailers, providing them with a powerful tool to enhance their marketing strategies.

data.title: McDermott completes first subsea project for TotalEnergies in Angola, including engineering, procurement, construction, installation, pre-commissioning, and commissioning activities.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, McDermott revealed the successful accomplishment of various tasks for TotalEnergies' Begonia project. These activities included engineering, procurement, construction, installation, pre-commissioning, and commissioning. The announcement highlighted the strategic importance of an Amazon vessel in ensuring the safe completion of these tasks. This achievement showcases McDermott's expertise in the industry and signifies a significant milestone.

data.title: I-care integrates with DimoMaint CMMS to bridge AI failure detection and reduce unplanned downtime.
data.description: A recent collaboration between DimoMaint's CMMS and I-care's I-see platform in Houston on Oct. 16, 2025, has connected AI-driven failure detection with CMMS operations. This integration aims to assist manufacturers in cutting unplanned downtime and prolonging asset lifespan. By merging these technologies, companies can tap into more efficient maintenance processes, potentially leading to improved productivity and cost savings.

data.title: Memecoins plummet by 40%, strive to recover from July lows. DOGE and SHIB among top tokens hit hard.
data.description: In just one day, the memecoin market saw a sharp decline of almost 40% before experiencing a small recovery. Despite this, prominent tokens such as DOGE and SHIB continue to show significant losses.

data.title: Janus International Group (NYSE: JBI) to report Q3 2025 results on Nov 6. Webcast & conference call at 10:00 am ET.
data.description: Temple, Georgia-based Janus International Group, Inc. (NYSE: JBI), a prominent global supplier of modern access control technologies and building products for the self-storage, commercial, and industrial industries, disclosed that it will unveil its third quarter financial outcomes for 2025 before the markets open on Thursday, November 6, 2025. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss these results.

data.title: Avathon introduces Autonomy for Aerospace Operations, expanding AI and knowledge platform capabilities.
data.description: Avathon unveiled Autonomy for Aerospace Operations, a new AI and knowledge platform designed to enhance operations efficiency in the aerospace industry. The launch signifies a shift in autonomy from the cockpit to various areas including factory floors, hangars, and supply chains. This initiative, announced on Oct. 16, 2025, in PLEASANTON, Calif., aims to transform Aerospace Operations significantly.

data.title: Alithya (TSX: ALYA) named global finalist in 2025 Oracle Partner Awards for Health and Life Sciences.
data.description: In Montreal on October 16, 2025, Alithya Group inc. revealed its achievement as a finalist in the 2025 Oracle Partner Awards in the Global Industry Solutions category for Health and Life Sciences. The company, with the stock symbol TSX: ALYA, has been recognized for its remarkable progress in this field. This accolade showcases Alithya's industry expertise and dedication to excellence.

data.title: Essential Utilities releases 2024 Sustainability Report, emphasizing progress on emissions reduction and infrastructure.
data.description: Essential Utilities Inc., a leading provider of water, wastewater, and natural gas services in the U.S., has recently unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report. As a publicly traded company listed on NYSE under WTRG, Essential Utilities has highlighted significant advancements in meeting its environmental objectives, enhancing employee well-being, and supporting the communities it operates in. The report emphasizes the company's ongoing efforts to reduce emissions and upgrade infrastructure, all while delivering outstanding service to its customers.

data.title: Solstice Gold to raise $1,000,000 through non-brokered private placement, selling Ontario FT Shares at $0.085 each.
data.description: Solstice Gold Corp. based in Vancouver, British Columbia, is planning to conduct a non-brokered private placement financing. The company, listed as TSXV: SGC, aims to raise $1,000,000 through this offering. The financing will involve issuing common shares known as Ontario FT Shares, specifically for Ontario residents, at a price of $0.085 per share. This initiative allows residents in Ontario to participate in the Offering at the specified price per share.

data.title: Volato and M2i Global advance development of US Strategic Mineral Reserve digital infrastructure. (Total companies mentioned: 2)
data.description: Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR) and M2i Global, Inc. (OTCQB: MTWO) have revealed the advancement of the digital and commercial infrastructure for the U.S. Strategic Mineral Reserve (SMR). Earlier this year, M2i laid the foundation and technical guidelines for the SMR project. Volato, known for its enterprise-software proficiency, is set to construct and activate the secure technology infrastructure for the SMR. This move marks a significant step forward in the development of the SMR system.

data.title: New Jersey Resources to host live webcast on Nov. 20, 2025, at 10 a.m. ET for Q4 and year-end financial results. Results released Nov. 19 after market close.
data.description: In WALL, N.J., New Jersey Resources (NYSE: NJR) is welcoming investors, customers, financial community members, and other stakeholders to tune in to a live webcast of its fiscal 2025 fourth-quarter and year-end financial results on Thursday, November 20, 2025, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time. The results will be disclosed on Wednesday, November 19, 2025, after the stock market closes. During the year-end conference call, NJR's senior leadership team will provide insights and have discussions.

data.title: Permian Resources will report Q3 2025 results on Nov 5, 2025, with an earnings call on Nov 6, 2025, 9:00 am CST. Dial (800) 549-8228 (ID: 91750) to participate.
data.description: In Midland, Texas, Permian Resources Corporation (NYSE: PR) disclosed plans to release its third quarter 2025 financial and operational outcomes post-market closure on Wednesday, November 5, 2025. Aiming to discuss these results, management will conduct an earnings conference call on Thursday, November 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time (10:00 a.m. Eastern Time). Those interested can join the call by dialing (800) 549-8228 with the Conference ID: 91750.

data.title: HASI will release Q3 2025 results on Nov 6, followed by 5 p.m. conference call. Dial 1-877-407-0890 (Toll-Free) to join.
data.description: HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. (NYSE: HASI) revealed plans to disclose its Q3 2025 results post-market closure on November 6, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day. To participate, individuals can dial toll-free at 1-877-407-0890 or +1-201-389-0918 (toll).

data.title: ThetaRho.ai partners with athenahealth, offering RISA app for instant patient data access via natural language queries.
data.description: In San Francisco, ThetaRho.ai revealed a partnership with athenahealth, Inc. The deal, under athenahealth’s Marketplace program, offers healthcare providers the RISA application for immediate access to patient data from various systems using natural language queries. This move allows athenahealth's expanding network to benefit from AI-driven clinical data intelligence solutions. The integration caters to improved efficiency for healthcare professionals in accessing comprehensive patient information.
